samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand A (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input operand B (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output for the product.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
        <parameter>ALU</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Initialize the product to zero.</description>
            <assign id="product" value="0" condition="reset"/>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic>
            <description>Initialize the shift register to the first operand.</description>
            <assign id="ALU[0]" value="A" condition="reset"/>
        </sequential_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <description>Iterate through each bit of the multiplier.</description>
            <for>
                <from id="i" value="0"/>
                <to value="7"/>
                <step id="i" value="i + 1"/>
                <description>Check if the current bit of the multiplier is set.</description>
                <if condition="B[i] == 1">
                    <description>Add the shifted multiplicand to the product.</description>
                    <assign id="product" value="product + ALU[i]"/>
                </if>
            </for>
        </combinational_logic>
        <combinational_logic>
            <description>Shift the multiplicand for the next iteration.</description>
            <for>
                <from id="j" value="0"/>
                <to value="7"/>
                <step id="j" value="j + 1"/>
                <description>Shift the multiplicand.</description>
                <assign id="ALU[j]" value="ALU[j] << 1"/>
            </for>
        </combinational_logic>
    </implementation>
</module>
